nasb.text: The precious sons of Zion, Weighed against fine gold, How they are regarded as earthen jars, The work of a potter’s hands!

esv.text: The precious sons of Zion, worth their weight in fine gold, how they are regarded as earthen pots, the work of a potter’s hands!

cnv.text: 錫安尊貴的眾民，本來和精金一樣貴重； 現在怎麼竟被看為瓦器，好像陶匠手中所作的呢？

ccb.text: 锡安的宝贝子民本来贵如黄金， 现在竟被视为陶匠制作的瓦器！
